title: Gradient Descent Optimization Algorithms: RMSprop & Adam
description: A flowchart comparing the parameter update process of standard Gradient Descent, RMSprop, and Adam optimizers, highlighting how RMSprop adapts the learning rate per parameter and how Adam combines this with momentum.
elements: RMSprop: Compute Moving Average of Squared Gradients (v)
Adam: Compute Moving Average of Gradients (m) and Squared Gradients (v)
relationships: Standard GD uses a fixed learning rate (η) to calculate Δθ
RMSprop uses v to normalize the learning rate per parameter, reducing oscillations
Adam combines m (momentum-like term) and v (RMSprop-like term) to calculate a more efficient update Δθ
